ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., Premier League, Seria A) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Current manager of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season (more precise than just the year) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season (more precise than just the year) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the season is the current one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team in the season */,
  "championship" TEXT /* Championship title won by the team in the season (if any) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of games lost in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals_for - goals_against) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (games without conceding a goal) */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received in the season */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance for home games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the season */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the previous season */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank from the previous season */,
  "points_change" INTEGER /* Change in points from the previous season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first season */,
  "season2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second season */,
  "points_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in points earned by the team between the two seasons */,
  "wins_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in wins between the two seasons */,
  "losses_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in losses between the two seasons */,
  "draws_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in draws between the two seasons */,
  "goals_for_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in goals scored between the two seasons */,
  "goals_against_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in goals conceded between the two seasons */,
  "goal_difference_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in goal difference between the two seasons */,
  "clean_sheets_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in clean sheets between the two seasons */,
  "yellow_cards_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in yellow cards between the two seasons */,
  "red_cards_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in red cards between the two seasons */,
  "attendance_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in average attendance between the two seasons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_season2_id FOREIGN KEY ("season2_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_season1_id FOREIGN KEY ("season1_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., top-tier, second-tier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "championship_name" TEXT /* Name of the championship */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the championship belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the championship's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the championship's logo */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_leagues" (
  "season_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season-league assignment */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_leagues_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_leagues_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leagues" (
  "team_league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-league assignment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leagues_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_leagues_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_championships" (
  "season_championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season-championship assignment */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_championships_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_championships_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_championships" (
  "team_championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-championship assignment */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_championships_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES championships ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_championships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
